data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of rescheduling a single instance, but the evidence provided does not confirm this functionality. The linked use case describes a recurring subscription model but does not explicitly mention the ability to reschedule a single instance, which constitutes a gap in the requirement. The evidence does not support the expected result of the exploratory step, as there is no indication that this specific functionality is implemented or covered.
gaps: The ability to reschedule a single instance is not explicitly covered in the linked use case.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define API for rescheduling instances
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the API allows rescheduling a single instance of the subscription.
